decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back to the battlefield using reanimation spells. Cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Harvester of Misery benefit from having a full graveyard, while Superior Spider-Man and Deceit provide powerful creatures to reanimate. The deck also includes card draw and control elements to help set up the combo and protect your creatures. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm your opponent with a strong board presence generated from the graveyard.

This UW Control deck focuses on disrupting your opponent's strategy with counterspells, removal, and board wipes while drawing cards to maintain card advantage. The deck also includes cards that exile graveyards and bounce threats back to the opponent's hand. The win condition comes from landing a powerful planeswalker like Ugin or Marang River Regent, or by overwhelming the opponent with card advantage and control. The deck aims to outlast the opponent by controlling the game and slowly grinding them down until victory is achieved.

The focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures like Twinmaw Stormbrood, Momo, and Nova Hellkite, supported by burn spells like Burst Lightning and Maelstrom of the Spirit Dragon to clear the way. The deck also utilizes powerful planeswalkers like Sarkhan, Dragon Ascendant to generate additional value and pressure opponents. The inclusion of cards like Clarion Conqueror and Voice of Victory provide additional support for the creature-centric game plan, while Cavern of Souls ensures key creatures can't be countered. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with fast, efficient threats while utilizing synergy and powerful spells to secure victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to control the board and rapidly deplete the opponent's life total. The creatures in the deck have abilities that allow them to generate value and control the tempo of the game. The spells in the deck are aimed at countering opponent's plays and removing threats efficiently. By creating pressure with its aggressive creatures and disrupting the opponent's game plan, this deck aims to close out the game quickly before the opponent can establish a strong defense.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to use a combination of card draw, removal, and counterspells to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategies. Cards like Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson can remove threats from the board, while spells like Spell Snare can counter key spells. Monument to Endurance and Accumulate Wisdom provide card advantage, allowing the player to maintain control of the game. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and control the pace of the game until it can secure a win condition.

The deck focuses on utilizing fast, aggressive creatures to overwhelm the opponent quickly. It includes a variety of creatures with abilities that boost their power or provide additional benefits. The deck also features cards that allow for mana ramping and card advantage to maintain pressure on the opponent. Overall, the strategy is to establish a strong board presence early in the game and maintain pressure to secure victory before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, allowing you to play powerful high-cost creatures like Bristly Bill, Spine Sower and Lumbering Worldwagon early in the game. Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer provide additional utility and power to your creatures, while cards like Escape Tunnel and Esper Origins help you protect them. The goal is to overwhelm your opponent with a swarm of aggressive creatures, utilizing the power of mono green cards to quickly build a strong board presence and win the game.

This Red Deck Wins aggro deck focuses on quickly dealing damage to the opponent using powerful creatures and burn spells. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures like Nova Hellkite and Hired Claw, while also utilizing direct burn spells like Lightning Strike, Burst Lightning, and Shock to take out opposing creatures and finish off the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Ojer Axonil, Deepest Might and Soulstone Sanctuary to provide additional value and resilience in longer games. The mana base includes lands like Rockface Village, Riverpyre Verge, and Steam Vents to ensure consistent access to red mana sources.

The focus of this deck is to control the board and tempo of the game through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage. Using cards like Abandon Attachments and Combustion Technique, the deck aims to consistently clear the opponent's threats while maintaining card advantage with Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent. The inclusion of Agna Qel'a and Gran-Gran provide additional value and utility, allowing the player to outvalue their opponent in the long game. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent through managing resources efficiently and controlling the game state.

The main focus of this deck is to establish control over the game by using a variety of spells and creatures to disrupt your opponent's strategy. With a mix of removal spells, card draw, and a selection of versatile creatures, this deck aims to outvalue and outlast your opponent until you can establish a dominant position on the board. By carefully managing your resources and using your cards effectively, you can steadily build up your advantage and ultimately secure victory through card advantage and board control.

The concept of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining card advantage through card draw and counterspells. It focuses on controlling the board with removal spells like Deadly Cover-Up and Requiting Hex, countering opponent's spells with Essence Scatter and Spell Snare, and drawing cards with Consult the Star Charts and Stock Up. The deck also includes win conditions like Wan Shi Tong, Librarian and Marang River Regent to close out the game once the opponent has been sufficiently controlled.

The main concept of this Dimir Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of aggressive creatures like Cecil, Dark Knight and Floodpits Drowner, backed up by powerful spells such as Tragic Trajectory and Shoot the Sheriff. The deck also focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Spyglass Siren and Phantom Interference. By maintaining a balance between aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while controlling the board and securing victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game using a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments, Accumulate Wisdom, and Spell Snare, the player can efficiently control the board and disrupt their opponent's game plan. Additionally, cards like Firebending Lesson and Artist's Talent provide additional removal options while cards like Iroh's Demonstration and It'll Quench Ya! offer card advantage. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent while maintaining control over the game until a winning condition can be achieved.

This deck focuses on aggressive play with fast creatures and burn spells to deal damage quickly to the opponent. It combines the power of Rakdos colors with aggressive creatures like Bloodghast and Flamewake Phoenix, as well as removal and burn spells like Bitter Triumph and Moonshadow. The deck also includes cards like Monument to Endurance to help maintain momentum and Multiversal Passage for mana fixing. Overall, the main goal of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient creatures and spells to secure a quick victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and disruption spells in order to apply pressure on the opponent and control the board. By playing cards like Floodpits Drowner, Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, and Tishana's Tidebinder, the deck aims to quickly establish a threatening board presence. Additionally, cards like Restless Reef and Multiversal Passage provide utility and flexibility in mana fixing. The inclusion of spells such as Phantom Interference and Requiting Hex helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain tempo. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its aggressive creatures while disrupting their strategy.

This deck focuses on applying early pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells. The deck's main strategy is to control the board and deal damage quickly, while also maintaining card advantage through various card draw and removal spells. By utilizing a mix of creatures with abilities and instant-speed spells, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and win the game through combat damage. The key to success lies in managing resources effectively and making optimal plays to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.
